data.content: Plan completed. Existing code already resolves per-action outputs into `StepMetadata`, but the missing pieces are a richer per-step target model, bundle/legacy mapping for that model, and prompt rendering that consumes resolved step metadata directly instead of a flattened profile-wide `output` token. Child work is split across `knots-c8f4` (model/mapping/runtime), `knots-0d93` (prompt rendering and Loom prompt assets), and `knots-9727` (regression coverage). Primary implementation risk is preserving legacy `remote_main` / `pr` behavior for built-in profiles and installed bundles while adding additive runtime and prompt metadata for branch, PR, merged main, and live deployment targets.
